title: Garlic Parmesan Pasta (One Pot!)
ingredients: Optional: 1/4 tsp each onion powder, oregano, thyme, parsley, and pepper
directions: Grate the Parmesan cheese and set aside to come to room temperature.
Melt 2 tbsp butter over medium heat in a large skillet.
Add the garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chicken broth and optional seasonings. Slowly add the milk, stirring. Bring to a boil.
Add the pasta. Use tongs to twist the noodles into the skillet as they soften.
Cook for 4–5 minutes, stirring occasionally so the noodles don't stick. Reduce heat to low.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp butter and toss to coat.
Gradually sprinkle in the Parmesan, stirring until smooth. The sauce thickens as it rests.
Top with fresh parsley and serve.
